anime: Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
title: CRIMSON BULLET (TV Size)
lyrics: Kuukyo ni aegu yami ga mushibamu
Kawaita kuuki yume wo kirisaki boukyaku no mukuro to kashite iku
Inochi moyashite kono michi no hate nani wo te ni suru no darou
Nigerarenai genjitsu kuramu you na shinjitsu
Semetateru kouman na joushiki ni namida karehate
Hiiro ni somaru futashika de zankoku na mirai
Tsuienu ketsui mune ni tomoshite semaru ima wo ikinuku
Wazuka na kibou terasu hikari ubawaretemo
Kitto kono honoo wa kese wa shinai
Ai wo sasagu you ni uchinuke Gun Blaze
